item.title: Remove interactive mode from backlog add
item.intent: cmd_backlog_add only accepts flags, no interactive TUI. The function loses ~105 lines. All existing flag-based usage is unchanged.
item.description: cmd_backlog_add has ~105 lines of interactive echo/read prompts and a confirmation dialog. This tool is used primarily by AI agents via flags. Remove the interactive code path entirely. When --title is missing, print a usage error with an example command instead of launching a TUI.
steps: Remove the interactive mode block (lines checking for missing title and -t 0, through the confirmation dialog)
When title is missing, print a concise usage error with one example and exit 1
Remove the interactive flag from arg parsing
Update cmd_help to remove interactive from backlog add docs
Verify: .aishore/aishore backlog add with title and type flags still works
acceptanceCriteria: cmd_backlog_add contains zero interactive read calls
The interactive flag is not accepted
Missing title prints a usage error with example, not a prompt
All flag-based add commands work identically to before
